scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n web,api "bun run --cwd apps/web dev" "bun run --cwd apps/api dev"
scripts.build: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n core,api,web "bun run --cwd packages/core build" "bun run --cwd apps/api build" "bun run --cwd apps/web build"
scripts.typecheck: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --max-processes 1 -n core,api,web "bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck" "bun run --cwd apps/api typecheck" "bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck"
scripts.lint: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n core,api,web "bun run --cwd packages/core lint" "bun run --cwd apps/api lint" "bun run --cwd apps/web lint"
scripts.test: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n core,api,web "bun run --cwd packages/core test" "bun run --cwd apps/api test" "bun run --cwd apps/web test"
